scene.terrain: dirt with sparse grass and scattered debris

nearby_persons.details: one person kneeling above the primary subject, appears to be providing aid

primary_subject.posture_prose: subject is supine on the ground; right leg extended at unnatural angle suggesting possible fracture
primary_subject.emt_assessment_prose: Non-ambulatory subject with possible long-bone injury; visible pooled fluid beneath right thigh consistent with active bleeding. Urgency: high.

blood_pool.evidence: dark pooled stain visible on the ground beneath the right thigh

standing.evidence: subject is on the ground, not upright

prone_back.evidence: torso is oriented face-up; chest is visible to the camera

prone_face.evidence: face is visible toward the camera, not down

side_lying.evidence: subject is squarely on their back, not on a side

sit_supp.evidence: subject is lying down, not seated

sit_unsupp.evidence: subject is lying down, not seated

tripod_pos.evidence: no tripod stance visible; subject is supine

amp_leg.evidence: both legs visible, though right is angled

amp_arm.evidence: left arm partially occluded by debris

protect_hand.evidence: hands are at sides, not raised toward any wound

is_medic.evidence: subject posture is casualty, not provider

secondary_entities.relation: kneeling 1m to the right of primary, facing primary
